content: Comparative evaluations of curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods (ICM vs RND vs hand-designed curious agents) reveal that an agent’s intrinsic memory architecture for encoding visited states is the unmeasured hidden variable that explains most performance variance between different curiosity bonuses. We can hypothesize that 2024-2025 SOTA active memory architectures, when paired with adaptive curiosity method routing, will outperform any fixed curiosity method across sparse-reward environments.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
